species: In this study, we carried out SILAC-based quantitative proteomic analysis of a HNSCC cell line (CAL 27) to investigate tyrosine signaling in response to curcumin.
cell_type: CAL 27 cells were treated with curcumin at varying concentrations (0–25 µM) and subjected to MTT assay.
disease_state: head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
